changeSet.author: ADMIN (generated)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope (name, uri_pattern, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, forward_type, forward_data) VALUES ('EKYC_ADMIN_SIGN_E_CONTRACT', 'get:/api/v1/equity/account/contracts', NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'CONNECTION', '{"uri": "/api/v1/equity/account/contracts", "service": "ekyc-admin", "forwardType": "SERVICE" }');

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_open_api (id, operation_id, tags, uri_pattern, summary, `security`, parameters, request_body, responses, description, `version`, created_at, updated_at) SELECT id, name, '["EKYC_ADMIN"]', uri_pattern, name, '[{"jwt": []}]', '[[{"in":"query","name":"contestId","schema":{"type":"number"},"required":true,"description":"Selected live trading contest"},{"in":"query","name":"period","schema":{"enum":["ALL","WEEEK"],"type":"string"},"description":""},{"in":"query","name":"withCondition","schema":{"type":"boolean"},"description":""},{"in":"query","name":"pageNumber","schema":{"type":"number"},"description":""},{"in":"query","name":"pageSize","schema":{"type":"number"},"description":""}]]', '[]', '{"200":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"investors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"bio":{"type":"string"},"userId":{"type":"number"},"ranking":{"type":"number"},"fullname":{"type":"string"},"username":{"type":"string"},"subAccount":{"type":"string"},"optinBoardDate":{"type":"string"},"rankingChanged":{"type":"number"},"investmentReturn":{"type":"double"}}}},"updatedDateTime":{"type":"string"}}}}},"description":"OK"},"401":{"description":"Your access token is invalid or expired"}}', 'recalculate profit loss by period ', '/api/v1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope WHERE name = 'EKYC_ADMIN_SIGN_E_CONTRACT';

INSERT IGNORE INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'EKYC_ADMIN_SIGN_E_CONTRACT' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API';

INSERT IGNORE INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'EKYC_ADMIN_SIGN_E_CONTRACT' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';
